texto: Letting him goThere is a particular kind of suffering to be experienced when you love something greater than yourself. A tender sacrifice. Like the pained silence felt in the lost song of a mermaid
autor: or the bent and broken feet of a dancing ballerina. It is in every considered step I am taking in the opposite direction of you.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a or the bent and broken feet of a dancing ballerina. It is in every considered step I am taking in the opposite direction of you.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “Letting him goThere is a particular kind of suffering to be experienced when you love something g…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, lang-leav, letting pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao-noturna e termino.
